---
title: "Penguins Analysis"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
---

```{r}
library(targets)
library(gtsummary)
tar_read(clean_data)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| results: asis
tar_load(models)

lapply(models, function(input) {
   tbl_regression(input)
})
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
